programs.name: Push / Pull / Legs (3 Day)
programs.note: One round per week. Good entry point before moving to 6-day PPL.

programs.name: Push / Pull (4 Day)
programs.note: Legs folded into push (quads) and pull (posterior chain) days.

programs.name: Bro Split
programs.goal: Build muscle (one body part per day)

programs.name: Push / Pull / Legs (6 Day)
programs.note: Run Push/Pull/Legs twice per week.

programs.name: Arnold Split
programs.note: Run the 3 days twice per week. Each muscle group is hit twice weekly.

programs.name: PPL x Arnold (6 Day)
programs.note: Hybrid: three PPL days plus two Arnold pairing days and a second legs day.

programs.name: Chest+Tri / Back+Bi / Legs+Shoulders
programs.note: Classic antagonist pairing split.

programs.name: PHUL (Power Hypertrophy Upper Lower)
programs.note: Two power days (heavy, low reps) and two hypertrophy days (volume).

programs.name: PHAT (Power Hypertrophy Adaptive Training)
programs.note: Layne Norton style. 2 power days + 3 hypertrophy days.

programs.name: StrongLifts 5x5
programs.note: Alternate Workout A and B across 3 sessions per week. Add weight each session.

programs.name: 5/3/1 (Wendler)
programs.note: Main lifts use the 5/3/1 percentage scheme (last set AMRAP). Accessories listed as 5x10.

programs.name: Dorian Yates Blood & Guts (HIT)
programs.note: After warm-ups, perform ONE all-out working set to failure (and beyond, with forced/negative reps).

programs.name: Dumbbell Only (Full Body)
programs.note: All you need is a pair of adjustable dumbbells. Run 3x per week.

programs.name: Calisthenics (Bodyweight)
programs.note: Needs a pull-up bar and dip station/bars. Run 3x per week.

programs.name: At Home (No Equipment)
programs.note: Zero equipment. Run 3x per week.

programs.name: V-Taper Builder
programs.note: Heavy emphasis on lat width and side delts. Minimal direct oblique work to keep the waist tight.

programs.name: Classic Physique (Golden Era)
programs.goal: Arnold-era proportions: full chest, taper, sweeping legs, peaked arms
programs.note: Bodybuilding body-part split focused on symmetry and proportion. Pullovers included for the classic ribcage look.

programs.name: Greek God (Lean Aesthetic)
programs.goal: Lean, proportionate, strong look with upper-body emphasis
programs.note: Kinobody-style. Low-rep strength on key lifts plus high-rep side delts. Built to pair with a lean physique.

programs.name: Superhero / Hollywood
programs.goal: Broad capped shoulders, V-taper, arms and visible abs

programs.name: Glute-Focused (Lower Aesthetic)
programs.goal: Build and shape glutes and legs (hourglass / lower-body emphasis)
programs.note: Two dedicated glute days plus quad and hamstring focus. One upper day to keep balance.

programs.name: Beach Body (Mirror Muscles)
programs.goal: Chest, arms, shoulders and abs (the muscles you see in the mirror)

programs.name: Boulder Shoulders (3D Delts)
programs.note: Shoulder-specialisation split. Delts hit twice with high side/rear-delt volume; rest of body maintained.

programs.name: Big Arms Specialisation
programs.note: Arm-specialisation split. Arms trained twice weekly with high volume; compounds keep the rest of the body growing.

programs.name: Starting Strength
programs.note: Rippetoe method. Alternate Workout A and B across 3 sessions/week. Add weight each session.

programs.name: Madcow 5x5
programs.note: Weekly progression: heavy Monday, light Wednesday, top-set Friday.

programs.name: nSuns 5/3/1 LP
programs.note: High-volume 5/3/1 variant. T1 main lift = 9 sets, T2 = 8 sets, run on percentages of training max.

programs.name: GZCLP
programs.note: GZCL tier system: T1 heavy (5x3+), T2 volume (3x10), T3 pump (3x15+).

programs.name: Powerbuilding
programs.note: Heavy strength work paired with bodybuilding accessories. Upper/lower over 4 days.

programs.name: Powerlifting Focus
programs.note: Competition-lift focused with targeted accessories.

programs.name: Fat Loss Circuit
programs.note: Run each day as a circuit with minimal rest (30-45s) between exercises. 2-3 rounds.

programs.name: HIIT + Strength Hybrid
programs.note: Each session ends with a HIIT finisher (20s work / 40s rest unless noted).

programs.name: Athletic Performance
programs.note: Explosive work first while fresh, then heavy strength, then conditioning.

programs.name: Sprinter (Lean Athletic)
programs.note: Powerful legs, capped delts, low body fat. Sprints included for conditioning and a hard, lean look.

programs.name: Back Specialisation
programs.goal: Build a wide, thick, detailed back
programs.note: Back trained twice: one width day, one thickness day.

programs.name: Leg Specialisation (Wheels)
programs.goal: Build bigger quads, hamstrings and glutes
programs.note: Legs trained twice: a quad-focused day and a hamstring/glute day.

programs.name: Chest Specialisation
programs.note: Chest trained twice with an upper-chest priority.

programs.name: Kettlebell Only (Full Body)
programs.goal: Build muscle & conditioning with one kettlebell
programs.note: Run this full-body template 3x per week.

programs.name: Gymnast (Advanced Calisthenics)
programs.goal: Build a lean, strong gymnast-style physique with bodyweight skills
programs.note: Needs pull-up bar, dip bars and floor space. Mixes strength skills with hypertrophy.
